_description: Tests FR-005 and SC-006: goal_gate: 'always' blocks terminal advance when goal phase not in phase_history

_test_cases.description: When done is next and blindqa has goal_gate:always but BLINDQA_COMPLETE not in phase_history, orchestrator redirects to blindqa instead of done
_test_cases.rationale: blindqa has goal_gate:always; BLINDQA_COMPLETE absent from phase_history; orchestrator must redirect to blindqa before advancing to done

_test_cases.description: When BLINDQA_COMPLETE is present in phase_history, orchestrator advances to done normally
_test_cases.rationale: blindqa goal_gate satisfied (BLINDQA_COMPLETE in history); advance proceeds normally to done

_goal_gate_logic: Before advancing to 'done', orchestrator checks all phases with goal_gate='always'. For each such phase, if no entry with signal matching '{PHASE_ID_UPPER}_COMPLETE' exists in phase_history, redirect to that phase first.
